full_text:
Xuan Fan 宣璠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xuan Fan (宣璠). Sacked Huang Wan and Yang Biao. Killed during Emperor Xian’s flight from Li Jue. Xuan Fan was affiliated with Dong Zhuo and the Han Dynasty. Xuan Fan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
